title: onobrychis lahidjanicus
intro: Onobrychis lahidjanicus, also known as Ladjanik or Persian vetch, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Onobrychis lahidjanicus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to alleviate symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders.
